prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: cinematic scene still. Story world: Dead Channel Protocol. Premise: A ghost app predicts outages, deaths, and your next move.. Setting: Smart-city control grid and abandoned transit nodes. Threat presence: Root Administrator. Recurring motifs: error beeps, node maps, black-screen prompts. Beat: Case Debrief (Reckoning). Narrative: Final scoring resolves ending branch and season continuity flags.. Render an immersive scene frame with spatial depth and hidden clue affordance.. Subgenre: techno/paranormal thriller. Tone: GROUNDED. Immediate scene brief: Final scoring resolves ending branch and season continuity flags.. Render an immersive scene frame with spatial depth and hidden clue affordance.. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. Absolutely no visible letters, words, signage, subtitles, captions, runes, glyphs, pseudo-text, document copy, watermark, logo, title treatment, UI overlay, labels, poster typography, or debug text. Create a dramatic environmental still with human-scale tension, investigative clues, and a slow-burn horror mood.
